user.title: Gubbins inventory bridge
user.description: Connect to your local Gubbins bridge. The token is the GUBBINS_BRIDGE_TOKEN you set in the bridge's .env file; it is stored securely by Home Assistant and never written to YAML.

zeroconf_confirm.title: Gubbins inventory bridge
zeroconf_confirm.description: Discovered a Gubbins bridge at {host}:{port}. Enter its access token (the GUBBINS_BRIDGE_TOKEN you set in the bridge's .env file) to finish. The token is never advertised over the network — it is stored securely by Home Assistant.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the bridge. Check the host and port, and that the bridge is running.
error.invalid_auth: The bridge rejected the token. Check GUBBINS_BRIDGE_TOKEN matches.

abort.already_configured: This Gubbins bridge is already configured.

search.name: Search inventory
search.description: Search the Gubbins inventory (read-only) and return matching items.

query.name: Query
query.description: Free text, or the power-user syntax (e.g. cap:voltage>3.3).

limit.name: Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of items to return (1–25).

adjust_quantity.name: Adjust quantity (check in / out)
adjust_quantity.description: Change a discrete item's stock by a signed amount. Requires the bridge to be started with GUBBINS_BRIDGE_ALLOW_WRITES=on; the change syncs back to the app conflict-free.

item_id.name: Item id
item_id.description: The Gubbins record id of the item (find it via the search service or the API).

delta.name: Delta
delta.description: Signed change: negative to check out, positive to check in.

note.name: Note
note.description: Optional note recorded in the item's activity log.
